creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
ugg, this port is not STAGEd either!
Add portlint is going crazy with the DOS CR-ended patches and use of OBSOLETE NOPORTDOCS

as stage support is now required by default to commit, it should have been added with the rest of the patch along with portlint checks.

If the vendor makefile supports DESTDIR by default, I'll try to fix it but if it's any kind of complicated I'm kicking it back.
